headline: “We Must Act Now”: 16 Nobel Laureates Issue Stark Warning About AI Job Threats
summary: Sixteen Nobel laureates just signed a letter that puts two of AI's most prominent skeptics in the same camp as Silicon Valley's biggest boosters, and the economists behind it say society may have only a few years to respond.

raw.headline: “We Must Act Now”: 16 Nobel Laureates Issue Stark Warning About AI Job Threats
raw.summary: Sixteen Nobel laureates just signed a letter that puts two of AI's most prominent skeptics in the same camp as Silicon Valley's biggest boosters, and the economists behind it say society may have only a few years to respond.

headline: Alation Recognized as a 2026 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice In Two Markets: Metadata Management Solutions and Data & Analytics Governance Platforms
summary: The Gartner® Peer Insights™ Customers' Choice Distinction Is Based on Feedback and Ratings from End-User Professionals Who Have Experience with the Product or ServiceREDWOOD CITY, Calif., July 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Alation, Inc., the creators of the intelligence operating system, today announced that it has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in two 2026 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer reports - Metadata Management Solutions and Data & Analytics Governance Platforms. headline: Gartner to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 4, 2026
summary: STAMFORD, Conn., July 21, 2026--Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) will report its financial results for second quarter 2026 before the market opens on Tuesday, August 4, 2026.

headline: Finance AI spending is stuck on efficiency gains, Gartner says
summary: Only 17% of CFOs report significant or transformational value from productivity-focused investments, according to the research.
